localeStrings.HEJ_LOGIN_SIGN_UP: Hej! Log in or sign up
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_INTRO_NONE: No IKEA locations found with current filters and zoom level.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_STORES_DESCRIPTION: Explore the full range. Use Click & Collect. Enjoy the restaurant, Swedish food store and free parking.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_SMALL_STORES_DESCRIPT: Shop a selection of home furnishings and accessories. Enjoy the snack bar and easy access by public transportation.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_PAOPS_DESCRIPTION: Enjoy planning services with IKEA home furnishing experts and order items for home delivery or pick-up.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_PUPS_INTERNAL_DESCRIP: Pick up online orders. Get fast and easy access and be on your way.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_PUPS_EXTERNAL_DESCRIP: Pick up online orders. Get fast and easy access and be on your way.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_TYPE_POPUPS_DESCRIPTION: For a limited time, experience a different kind of IKEA store.
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_MODAL_HEADER: Find the IKEA locations closest to you
localeStrings.STORE_LOCATOR_MODAL_INTRO: IKEA stores now come in different shapes and sizes. Explore nearby IKEA locations and find the one that best suits your needs.
localeStrings.STORE_PICKER_SELECT_STORE_TEXT: Find your preferred store to learn about its opening hours, stock availability, and relevant offers.
localeStrings.STORE_PICKER_CURRENT_LOCATION_FAIL_TEXT: Make sure you've allowed your browser to access your current location and try again.
localeStrings.STORE_PICKER_STORES_SORTED_BY: Stores are sorted by distance to {{location}}
localeStrings.STORE_PICKER_SEARCH_NO_HITS_TEXT: Enter a valid location in your country/region and try again.
localeStrings.LOCATION_POPUP_DESCRIPTION_1: Did you know that you’re visiting the {{country}} site right now?
localeStrings.LOCATION_POPUP_DESCRIPTION_2: Would you like to visit the IKEA {{country}} site instead?
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: You've selected {{postal code}} as your postcode
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_CONSENT: We use cookies to provide this service. Read more about how we use cookies in {{cookie policy link}}. Please note that your location won’t be shared.
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_ENTER_YOUR_POSTALCODE_: Get updated information about product delivery and stock availability for your area.
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_POSTALCODE_NOT_VALID_E: Please enter a valid postal code (e.g., 75011)
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_NUDGE_TEXT: Add your ZIP code to see delivery information for products.
localeStrings.POSTALCODE_PICKER_NUDGE_AUTOLOCATION_TEX: Hej! Hope we got this right, otherwise please update your location.
localeStrings.SITE_MENU_LOCALISATION_PICKER_LABEL: Change language or country/region, current language is {{language}}
localeStrings.LOCALISATION_CURRENT_STORE_HEADING: You’re viewing the United States ikea.com
localeStrings.LOCALISATION_CHANGE_COUNTRY_DISCLAIMER: Please be aware your shopping cart will be emptied if changed.
localeStrings.EMERGENCY_MESSAGE_CHECKOUT: Our sales and checkout areas are experiencing issues at the moment. Please try again later.
localeStrings.EMERGENCY_MESSAGE_GENERAL: Some things might not work as they should. This could be due to maintenance or another issue. Please check back in a few hours.
localeStrings.EMERGENCY_MESSAGE_LIMITED_RANGE_BUYABILI: Some parts of our range are currently unavailable online. Please try again later. Still unavailable? Browse the range for a similar item.
localeStrings.EMERGENCY_MESSAGE_LOGIN: It’s not possible to log in at the moment. Please continue to shop as a guest.
localeStrings.EMERGENCY_MESSAGE_STORE_CHECKOUT: Our in-store checkout is currently not working. In the meantime, you can shop and pay online.
localeStrings.VOC_OVERALL_HEADING: How satisfied are you with your shopping experience?
localeStrings.VOC_OVERALL_TEXT: By completing this short survey you let us know what we’re doing well and where we can make improvements.
localeStrings.VOC_STATEMENTS_HEADING: How satisfied are you with the following points?
localeStrings.VOC_STATEMENTS_TEXT: If any questions aren't applicable to you, just skip them.
localeStrings.VOC_STATEMENT_8: Appeal of IKEA Family member benefits:
localeStrings.VOC_MORE_TEXT: Please don't provide personal details that will identify yourself or any other person. If you do, this will be processed as per our {{privacy policy link}}.

translations.mov_termsconditions_modal_content_1: To qualify for delivery, your shopping bag must have a merchandise subtotal of {movThreshold} or more after discounts, credits or promotional offers. translations.mov_termsconditions_modal_content_2: Need a little more to qualify? Simply add more products or increase quantities in your bag. Or, if it's more convenient, you can skip the minimum altogether by choosing pick-up (where available).

content.name: $5 off next product purchase*
content.description: Got your eye on a final touch for your latest project? This $5 off product reward is for you! Whether it’s finishing your room off with a bold lamp, a chic vase, or even a new plant, we’ll help bring your ideas to life.
content.spotlight:
• Once issued, voucher valid for 30 days only.
  • Valid in-store and online; $5 minimum spend (pre-tax) required.
  • Once you choose your reward, you cannot return or refund the reward and receive your points back.
content.imageAltText: A couple shopping for cooking materials at IKEA

content.name: $10 off any delivery service*
content.description: With this handy reward you can get a $10 discount on your home furnishings home delivery when you shop online.
content.spotlight:
• Once issued, voucher valid for 30 days only.
  • Discount applied pre-tax.
  • Once you choose your reward, you cannot return or refund the reward and receive your points back.
content.imageAltText: A family assembling a wardrobe together

content.name: $50 off Assembly Service via Taskrabbit*

t.RETURNS_TITLE: It's OK to change your mind
t.RETURNS_BODY: Return within 365 days for a full refund*.
t.LOW_PRICE_GUARANTEE_BODY: Price drops? Get the difference back within 90 days with
t.RETURNS_MODAL_TITLE: It's OK to change your mind
t.RETURNS_MODAL_BODY_1: If you're not totally satisfied with your IKEA purchase you can return new and unopened products within 365 days, together with your proof of purchase, for a full refund. You may also return open products within 180 days, with your proof of purchase, for a full refund.
t.RETURNS_MODAL_BODY_2: Removal and Pick-up services at customers homes vary by market. If the Pick-up service is available in your area, please bring your product to your covered porch, garage or doorstep.
t.RETURNS_MODAL_BODY_3: We do not accept returns on custom countertops and as-is products.
t.RETURNS_MODAL_BODY_4: We are unable to refund or exchange your items if your merchandise is found to be modified from its original form when purchased, dirty, stained, or damaged. We apologize for any inconvenience.
t.RETURNS_MODAL_LEARN_MORE: Learn more about our Return Policy

content.alt: MARKUS office chair, black. Mesh back, adjustable tilt, armrests. Ergonomic design for comfort.
MARKUS Office chair, Vissle dark gray, Medium
content.transcript: The video showcases the MARKUS office chair, demonstrating its innovative and surprising features. It presents a chair that appears to interact with its user in unexpected ways, suggesting advanced motion control or smart technology integration. The chairs design is sleek and modern, with an emphasis on ergonomic comfort. As the chair rotates, it creates an appealing visual effect, drawing attention to its dynamic capabilities. The background and lighting are minimalistic, putting the focus entirely on the chair itself, its functions, and its unique selling points.

content.alt: MARKUS Office chair, Vissle dark gray, Medium

content.transcript: The video showcases the MARKUS office chair, which is designed with modern aesthetics suitable for contemporary workspaces. The chair features a sleek and ergonomic design, offering adjustable height and lumbar support for extended periods of sitting. It also appears to have a sturdy build and comfortable padding for enhanced user comfort. The chair is presented in various angles and settings, demonstrating its functionality within different environments. This video serves as an advertisement or promotional material for the product, highlighting its features and benefits to potential customers.

translations.MOV_TERMSCONDITIONS_MODAL_CONTENT_1: To qualify for delivery, your shopping bag must have a merchandise subtotal of {movThreshold} or more after discounts, credits or promotional offers. Gift card purchases, taxes, shipping and delivery fees, assembly or other service fees do not count towards {movThreshold} minimum.
translations.MOV_TERMSCONDITIONS_MODAL_CONTENT_2: Need a little more to qualify? Simply add more products or increase quantities in your bag. Or, if it's more convenient, you can skip the minimum altogether by choosing pick-up (where available).

translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_BASE_FEE: Assembly services require a flat fee of {assemblyServiceFee} per order. This one-time charge is applied at checkout, regardless of how many items you select for assembly. The final price will be available during checkout
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_1_CONTEN: Assembly by Taskrabbit is available in most metro areas in the US. Availability of Taskers vary based on demand. Visit www.taskrabbit.com/IKEA for a complete list of the metro areas.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_1_TITLE: Is Assembly by Taskrabbit available in my area?
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_2_CONTEN: Furniture assembly and mounting is available for most IKEA items. Taskers follow assembly instructions and will secure items to the wall when specified.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_2_TITLE: What is included in my assembly?
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_3_CONTEN: You can book assembly of your IKEA furniture for as early as tomorrow and up to 90 days in advance.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_3_TITLE: When can I book my assembly?
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_4_CONTEN: When booking through IKEA in store and online through ikea.com, you'll pre-pay for your desired assembly service when you checkout.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_4_TITLE: When do I pay for my task?
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_FAQ_5_CONTEN: Pricing will be per item, based on the quantity and types of items to be assembled. The final cost will depend on which items you select for assembly. Assembly services require a minimum fee of $52.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_INTRO: Assembly service is available for {productName} at {zipCode}.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_INTRODUCTION: Assembly service is available for {productName}at {zipCode}. You can add this service from your shopping cart and schedule your preferred time during checkout.
translations.PIP_SERVICES_ASSEMBLY_MODAL_MIN_FEE: Assembly services require a minimum fee of {assemblyServiceFee}. The final cost will depend on which items you select for assembly. This service can be added to individual products in your cart during checkout. You will pre-pay for your desired assembly service when you checkout.

productSummaryProps.description: This ergonomic office chair keeps you comfy and focused with features like a manually adjustable tilt tension, and head-/armrests to help relax the muscles in your neck and back. 10 year guarantee.

image.alt: This product is developed and tested according to ANSI/BIFMA x5.1 standards.

designer.label: Designer
designer.name: Henrik Preutz
designer.imageAlt: Black and white portrait of Henrik Preutz wearing a shirt and jacket, with short hair.

image.alt: Contract grade

highlightedReviews.name: Steven
highlightedReviews.title: Very comfortable chair
highlightedReviews.text: Really easy to assemble and comfortable to sit on. The back of the chair provides great support. I purchased this to replace a cheaper Mighty Ape chair that wasn’t ergonomic and really noticed the difference! Great price too.

highlightedReviews.name: Anonymous reviewer
highlightedReviews.title: Great product. Would recommend.
highlightedReviews.text:
Very comfortable, solid, roomy and supportive home office chair. Easy to assemble, very sturdy with adjustable height. 
Mid range price and worth paying the extra for such a great chair. Would recommend. 5*

highlightedReviews.name: Eva
highlightedReviews.title: Good chair and worth buying
highlightedReviews.text: Good value and quality - it has lasted in good condition after years of daily use. The back is a little high but otherwise no issues.

image.alt: Contract grade

goodToKnow.name: May be completed
goodToKnow.text: May be used with KOLON floor protector.

materials.part: Back frame/ Armrest frame/ Back bar:

texts: Light stains can be removed with a textile cleaner or a damp sponge and a mild soapy solution.
Wipe clean with a mild soapy solution.
Wipe dry with a clean cloth.

safetyAndCompliance.name: Test results and compliance
safetyAndCompliance.text: This chair has been tested for office use and meets the requirements for durability and stability set forth in the following standards: EN 1335 and ANSI/BIFMA x5.1.

image.alt: This product is developed and tested according to ANSI/BIFMA x5.1 standards.

paragraphs: 10-year Warranty. Read about the terms in the warranty brochure.
The mesh material of the backrest lets air through to your back during long sitting periods.
The chair cover is made from Vissle fabric in polyester, which is dope-dyed. It’s a durable material with a smooth weave and a nice two-tone effect.
This ergonomic office chair has lots of functions that allow you to easily adapt the chair to your body.
Lumbar support – Promotes good posture and reduces strain on lower back.
Armrests – Support your forearms and reduce strain on the back and shoulders.
Manual tilt tension – To adjust the resistance of the backrest.
Synchronized tilt tension – Moves with you as you recline, opening the hips and torso to improve circulation and energy.
Tilt Lock (3 positions) – Locks the chair at different angles for added stability and support.
Adjustable seat height – Promotes good posture and reduces strain on lower back.
Safety function – Castors lock when the chair is not in use to keep it securely in place.

fallbackImage.alt: MARKUS office chair, black. Mesh back, adjustable tilt, armrests. Ergonomic design for comfort.

images.alt: MARKUS Office chair, Vissle dark gray, Medium
Illustration with measurements for the product: MARKUS.

reviews.name: Paul
reviews.text:
Cons: The headrest sticks to my basically straight, male hair, the lumbar doesn't feel too firm to the touch of a hand, but wow does it jab one firmly in the back, and the wheels are pure garbage (they simply don't roll, they drag). 

Pros: I believe that with the headrest, on a 5' 8" person, the angle of the seat through to headrest seems positive, as I don't feel like I have to crane my neck. 

So, overall, an odd mix of what to be cheap materials and decent design, lead to an average user experience.
reviews.title: The latest iteration...no bueno

reviews.name: Ryan
reviews.text: I had this chair for about 10 years before it finally broke.  Working remotely and long gaming sessions, this chair worked great!  Sadly, the newest of this chair no longer has cushioned arms, as the arms are now hard plastic/rubber.
reviews.title: Best chair for tall gamers

reviews.name: Rhiannon
reviews.text: Teenager wanting a new gaming chair for small space…after trying them all out on demo floor, this won! Comfort upright & reclined, perfect size for teen & room space, and mom liked the design. Worth the extra cost & easy to assemble!
reviews.title: Teen Gamer Approved

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.text: Chair is fine, overpriced, but fine. I find it ridiculous that Ikea can't ship a chair to my house so I had to drive 260 miles to pick it up. It was what my son wanted for Christmas, othwiae no way I'm driving 260 miles for this thing.
reviews.title: Why no delivery?

reviews.name: Stephanie
reviews.text: High back is perfect for tall people, very comfortable!
reviews.title: Great for tall people

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.text: I loved the Markus chair that I bought in 2018/2019.  As a WFH employee and avid gamer, I used it daily and even bought 3rd party wheel upgrades.  The "update" to the Markus chair is terribly disappointing.  The seat is hard as can be, even when adjusting to the least firm setting.  The lumbar support is so aggressive that it could cure scoliosis.  The chair is more narrow, I'm only a 36 waist and it was very uncomfortable.    And it sits much higher up, even on the lowest setting.  And to top it all off, they've downgraded from leather (pleather?)  to a tough fabric material.  My new markus is sitting in the car, waiting to be returned.  I've drug the old Markus back from the curb for one last hurrah.  Do not recommend this chair in its current state.
reviews.title: Disappointing Downgrade

reviews.name: Ven
reviews.text:
The chair is comfortable and works well for what I need. I’ve had it for about two years and it’s been fine up until recently. Now the seat randomly starts going down while I’m using it. I usually keep it at the highest setting, but it slowly drops to the lowest after a while.

I went to IKEA to see if there was anything they could do, but they told me I should just buy a new one. It’s frustrating because the chair still looks good and feels fine otherwise, but the height adjustment issue makes it hard to use long term.

Overall, it’s a decent chair for the price, but don’t expect it to last more than a couple of years without issues.
reviews.title: 3 out of 5 stars

reviews.name: Andrew
reviews.text: I've had this chair for a few years and the only issue I have with it is that the arm rest rubber starts to rub off after prolonged usage. I would gladly pay to replace just the arm rests if that was possible. Sadly, it does not appear to be an option.
reviews.title: Arm rests need to be replaced

reviews.name: Aleksandar
reviews.text: Очень плохое кресло, Юрцу точно не подойдет
reviews.title: Bad deal

reviews.name: Elle
reviews.text: I was really excited about this chair. I read reviews, watched a video to put it together on my own, and settled because of the comfort even though it wasn’t the ideal aesthetic. Unfortunately after less than 2 weeks the arm rest is actually peeling off into pieces. I’ve never seen this happen before, and seems like a major defect for a $300 chair. Unfortunately I can’t locate my receipt. I’m hoping there is some sort of fix for this.
reviews.title: Peeling arm rest

reviews.name: Chris
reviews.text: The chair was easy to assemble and I like the feature that you need to be seated in the chair in order to roll / move it. This would be ideal for a household with small children so that the chair would remain stationary and not roll over small feet. My only grumble is that the chair's headrest feels and looks very inexpensive. The fabric is wrinkled on the top edge instead of laying flat. Not a deal breaker for the price. Love all the levers to make adjustments to the chair's height and angle/pitch.
reviews.title: Material of headrest could be thicker

reviews.name: Sarah
reviews.text: I sit at my computer for between 8-10 hours daily. I can definitely tell a difference in comfort level vs the chair I have at my work office. My lower back does not usually hurt after sitting in the Markus. Very much worth the investment.
reviews.title: Comfy chair for long periods of sitting

reviews.name: Anonymous
reviews.text: Comfortable
reviews.title: Good item

reviews.name: Carrie
reviews.text: Easy to assemble, looks beautiful, and is so comfortable.
reviews.title: Markus

reviews.name: Justtryingtoleaveareview
reviews.text:
I have a pretty long torso and have struggled to find a decent office chair that supports my back effectively. The Markus was good for a little over 6 months before the padding in the seat really started to sink (I work from home and sit in this chair at least 8 hours a day) even though I weigh under 160 pounds. 
So now, because the padding has worn thin, the back support really causes me a lot of pain. The seat isn't particularly adjustable aside from height and tilt, the lumbar support isn't adjustable, so I have to get an entirely new chair after less than a year even though this one is guaranteed for 10 years, whatever that means. It is cheap to touch but I didn't really care at the time, but now it's just one more thing that I cannot stand about this product.
reviews.title: Less than a year, more than 180 days

reviews.name: Rob
reviews.text: THE PADDING IN THE SEAT IS ONLY ONE STEP ABOVE SITTING ON A ROCK.  I HAD BOUGHT 6 OF THE BLACK LEATHER VERSIONS OVER THE YEARS AND THE PADDING WAS BETTER ALTHOUGH THEY WENT FLAT AFTER 2 TO 3 YEARS AND HAD TO BE REPLACED.  NOW YOU HAVE DONE AWAY WITH LEATHER (PLEATHER) AND ONLY OFFER THE CLOTH VERSION AND THE SEAT PAD IS TERRIBLY THIN AND IS ALMOST NON-EXISTENT AFTER A MONTH.  I ONLY WEIGH 210 LBS.  THE LUMBAR SUPPORT IS TOO STRONG AND NOT IN A GREAT SPOT AND HURTS MY BACK.  THIS WAS NEVER A PROBLEM WITH THE PREVIOUS VERSION.   THE PRICE WAS ALWAYS HIGH BEFORE AT AROUND $250 TO $300 FOR THE LEATHER BUT NOW THE QUALITY HAS GONE DOWN AND THE PRICE HAS GONE UP.  THIS COMBINATION IS THE COMPLETE OPPOSITE OF VALUE.  THE BASE IS ALSO NOT AS STABLE AS THE OLDER VERSIONS AND HAS MINUTE WOBBLE ALREADY THAT TOOK THE PREVIOUS VERSIONS I BOUGHT ABOUT 3 YEARS TO NOTICE ANY MOVEMENT FROM SIDE TO SIDE ON THE BASE.  I DEFINITELY CANNOT RECOMMEND THE CURRENT MARKUS CHAIR.
reviews.title: TERRIBLE UPDATE TO A CHAIR THAT WAS PREVIOUSLY AWESOME.

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.text: I bought this chair as a replacement for for a chair that I bought at IKEA 15 years ago.  It's been a great chair, and helpfully this one will be as well.  Easy to assemble, took about 20 minutes once everything was un packed.
reviews.title: Great chair

reviews.name: Rashad
reviews.text:
I love this chair! The high back with the cushion is very supportive. The chair is remarkably study and well made. The controls and ergonomics are superb. 

However, there are some things I'd like to see done differently. The arm rests are made of a tire rubber-like material which is not bad, but I wish the arms were designed with an open loop of metal instead of the closed loop such that edges of the loop don't press into the side of your leg. As others have mentioned, the seat cushion doesn't pad enough for longer sitting. Forces you to take a rest from sitting, which may not be a bad thing. Really, it's only uncomfortable if your chair is too low, in other words, it forces you to sit with good posture. To reduce the pressure on your butt, raise the chair so that your weight is distributed across your thighs. The price is in my opinion too high. Otherwise, it's great!

Although it has a high price, I am willing to pay for a high-quality comfortable office recliner that looks nice!
reviews.title: Perfect chair...well, almost

reviews.name: Mehmet
reviews.text: It is very uncomfortable. In the beginning, I wa using it less, when I started to use it more , I understand it is not supportive
reviews.title: started back problems

reviews.name: James
reviews.text: What an excellent purchase! Very happy with this chair. Super easy to put together, very sturdy & downright comfortable. Seat & back are supportive & while there are no back adjustments, the back is comfortable as it is. Love the look of it, too. Very high quality, well made, rollers are super smooth and SHARP! Highly recommended, high value for money!
reviews.title: GREAT Chair, comfortable, stylish

ordinaryItems.subject: Material
ordinaryItems.text: Polyester is a durable, quick-drying and insulating material that is optimal to use for textiles and as filling in pillows, quilts and furniture. The material is made from crude oil – a limited resource. Since IKEA doesn’t want to contribute to more virgin oil being used, we are now gradually switching to recycled and traceable polyester from sources like PET bottles. What’s nice is that polyester can be recycled over and over, without changing or losing its great qualities.

ordinaryItems.header: A good day at the office
ordinaryItems.subject: Function/solution
ordinaryItems.text: You work and feel better when you sit comfortably. MARKUS swivel chair is tested for professional office use and therefore meets your requirements for safety, durability and stability. You can easily adjust the chair to suit your body and the built-in lumbar support relieves your back. The airy mesh fabric in the backrest lets air circulate and reduces the environmental impact of transport, as it makes the chair both lighter and more compact.

featuredLink.body: Bring your ideas to life with special discounts, inspiration, and lots of good things in store. It's all free.
featuredLink.body2: Enjoy a number of unique benefits to create a better life at work.

description: MARKUS Office chair - Vissle dark gray Medium. 10-year Warranty. Read about the terms in the warranty brochure. Suitable for business use. The mesh material of the backrest lets air through to your back during long sitting periods. Manual tilt tension – To adjust the resistance of the backrest.
name: MARKUS Office chair - Vissle dark gray Medium

review.name: The latest iteration...no bueno
review.reviewBody:
Cons: The headrest sticks to my basically straight, male hair, the lumbar doesn't feel too firm to the touch of a hand, but wow does it jab one firmly in the back, and the wheels are pure garbage (they simply don't roll, they drag). 

Pros: I believe that with the headrest, on a 5' 8" person, the angle of the seat through to headrest seems positive, as I don't feel like I have to crane my neck. 

So, overall, an odd mix of what to be cheap materials and decent design, lead to an average user experience.

review.name: Best chair for tall gamers
review.reviewBody: I had this chair for about 10 years before it finally broke.  Working remotely and long gaming sessions, this chair worked great!  Sadly, the newest of this chair no longer has cushioned arms, as the arms are now hard plastic/rubber.

review.name: Teen Gamer Approved
review.reviewBody: Teenager wanting a new gaming chair for small space…after trying them all out on demo floor, this won! Comfort upright & reclined, perfect size for teen & room space, and mom liked the design. Worth the extra cost & easy to assemble!

review.name: Why no delivery?
review.reviewBody: Chair is fine, overpriced, but fine. I find it ridiculous that Ikea can't ship a chair to my house so I had to drive 260 miles to pick it up. It was what my son wanted for Christmas, othwiae no way I'm driving 260 miles for this thing.

review.name: Great for tall people
review.reviewBody: High back is perfect for tall people, very comfortable!

review.name: Disappointing Downgrade
review.reviewBody: I loved the Markus chair that I bought in 2018/2019.  As a WFH employee and avid gamer, I used it daily and even bought 3rd party wheel upgrades.  The "update" to the Markus chair is terribly disappointing.  The seat is hard as can be, even when adjusting to the least firm setting.  The lumbar support is so aggressive that it could cure scoliosis.  The chair is more narrow, I'm only a 36 waist and it was very uncomfortable.    And it sits much higher up, even on the lowest setting.  And to top it all off, they've downgraded from leather (pleather?)  to a tough fabric material.  My new markus is sitting in the car, waiting to be returned.  I've drug the old Markus back from the curb for one last hurrah.  Do not recommend this chair in its current state.

review.name: 3 out of 5 stars
review.reviewBody:
The chair is comfortable and works well for what I need. I’ve had it for about two years and it’s been fine up until recently. Now the seat randomly starts going down while I’m using it. I usually keep it at the highest setting, but it slowly drops to the lowest after a while.

I went to IKEA to see if there was anything they could do, but they told me I should just buy a new one. It’s frustrating because the chair still looks good and feels fine otherwise, but the height adjustment issue makes it hard to use long term.

Overall, it’s a decent chair for the price, but don’t expect it to last more than a couple of years without issues.

review.name: Arm rests need to be replaced
review.reviewBody: I've had this chair for a few years and the only issue I have with it is that the arm rest rubber starts to rub off after prolonged usage. I would gladly pay to replace just the arm rests if that was possible. Sadly, it does not appear to be an option.

review.name: Bad deal
review.reviewBody: Очень плохое кресло, Юрцу точно не подойдет

review.name: Peeling arm rest
review.reviewBody: I was really excited about this chair. I read reviews, watched a video to put it together on my own, and settled because of the comfort even though it wasn’t the ideal aesthetic. Unfortunately after less than 2 weeks the arm rest is actually peeling off into pieces. I’ve never seen this happen before, and seems like a major defect for a $300 chair. Unfortunately I can’t locate my receipt. I’m hoping there is some sort of fix for this.

review.name: Material of headrest could be thicker
review.reviewBody: The chair was easy to assemble and I like the feature that you need to be seated in the chair in order to roll / move it. This would be ideal for a household with small children so that the chair would remain stationary and not roll over small feet. My only grumble is that the chair's headrest feels and looks very inexpensive. The fabric is wrinkled on the top edge instead of laying flat. Not a deal breaker for the price. Love all the levers to make adjustments to the chair's height and angle/pitch.

review.name: Comfy chair for long periods of sitting
review.reviewBody: I sit at my computer for between 8-10 hours daily. I can definitely tell a difference in comfort level vs the chair I have at my work office. My lower back does not usually hurt after sitting in the Markus. Very much worth the investment.

review.name: Good item
review.reviewBody: Comfortable

review.name: Markus
review.reviewBody: Easy to assemble, looks beautiful, and is so comfortable.

review.name: Less than a year, more than 180 days
review.reviewBody:
I have a pretty long torso and have struggled to find a decent office chair that supports my back effectively. The Markus was good for a little over 6 months before the padding in the seat really started to sink (I work from home and sit in this chair at least 8 hours a day) even though I weigh under 160 pounds. 
So now, because the padding has worn thin, the back support really causes me a lot of pain. The seat isn't particularly adjustable aside from height and tilt, the lumbar support isn't adjustable, so I have to get an entirely new chair after less than a year even though this one is guaranteed for 10 years, whatever that means. It is cheap to touch but I didn't really care at the time, but now it's just one more thing that I cannot stand about this product.

review.name: TERRIBLE UPDATE TO A CHAIR THAT WAS PREVIOUSLY AWESOME.
review.reviewBody: THE PADDING IN THE SEAT IS ONLY ONE STEP ABOVE SITTING ON A ROCK.  I HAD BOUGHT 6 OF THE BLACK LEATHER VERSIONS OVER THE YEARS AND THE PADDING WAS BETTER ALTHOUGH THEY WENT FLAT AFTER 2 TO 3 YEARS AND HAD TO BE REPLACED.  NOW YOU HAVE DONE AWAY WITH LEATHER (PLEATHER) AND ONLY OFFER THE CLOTH VERSION AND THE SEAT PAD IS TERRIBLY THIN AND IS ALMOST NON-EXISTENT AFTER A MONTH.  I ONLY WEIGH 210 LBS.  THE LUMBAR SUPPORT IS TOO STRONG AND NOT IN A GREAT SPOT AND HURTS MY BACK.  THIS WAS NEVER A PROBLEM WITH THE PREVIOUS VERSION.   THE PRICE WAS ALWAYS HIGH BEFORE AT AROUND $250 TO $300 FOR THE LEATHER BUT NOW THE QUALITY HAS GONE DOWN AND THE PRICE HAS GONE UP.  THIS COMBINATION IS THE COMPLETE OPPOSITE OF VALUE.  THE BASE IS ALSO NOT AS STABLE AS THE OLDER VERSIONS AND HAS MINUTE WOBBLE ALREADY THAT TOOK THE PREVIOUS VERSIONS I BOUGHT ABOUT 3 YEARS TO NOTICE ANY MOVEMENT FROM SIDE TO SIDE ON THE BASE.  I DEFINITELY CANNOT RECOMMEND THE CURRENT MARKUS CHAIR.

review.name: Great chair
review.reviewBody: I bought this chair as a replacement for for a chair that I bought at IKEA 15 years ago.  It's been a great chair, and helpfully this one will be as well.  Easy to assemble, took about 20 minutes once everything was un packed.

review.name: Perfect chair...well, almost
review.reviewBody:
I love this chair! The high back with the cushion is very supportive. The chair is remarkably study and well made. The controls and ergonomics are superb. 

However, there are some things I'd like to see done differently. The arm rests are made of a tire rubber-like material which is not bad, but I wish the arms were designed with an open loop of metal instead of the closed loop such that edges of the loop don't press into the side of your leg. As others have mentioned, the seat cushion doesn't pad enough for longer sitting. Forces you to take a rest from sitting, which may not be a bad thing. Really, it's only uncomfortable if your chair is too low, in other words, it forces you to sit with good posture. To reduce the pressure on your butt, raise the chair so that your weight is distributed across your thighs. The price is in my opinion too high. Otherwise, it's great!

Although it has a high price, I am willing to pay for a high-quality comfortable office recliner that looks nice!

review.name: started back problems
review.reviewBody: It is very uncomfortable. In the beginning, I wa using it less, when I started to use it more , I understand it is not supportive

review.name: GREAT Chair, comfortable, stylish
review.reviewBody: What an excellent purchase! Very happy with this chair. Super easy to put together, very sturdy & downright comfortable. Seat & back are supportive & while there are no back adjustments, the back is comfortable as it is. Love the look of it, too. Very high quality, well made, rollers are super smooth and SHARP! Highly recommended, high value for money!
